lines: Mukiz' umpe kumenya ,Naho kab' agace, K'urukundo rw'igitangaza Rwatumy' udupfira.
Umenyeshe, Mukiza, Uko wababajwe, Ubw' Uwera wang' ibyaha pe
Umenyesh' ibyo, Yesu, Kuko bikomeye, Bikarut'uko byashobora Kumenywa
Mbes' imbereri, Yesu, ni zo zakubambye ? Oya si zo, ni za mbabazi Wangiriy'
Ntangajwe na rwa rupfu Wamfiriye, Yesu, Ko rwashoboye kunshungura Ngo
Ni rwo runkiz' ibyaha Bose bambonaho; Si byo byonyine: runkuramlo N'ibinyihishemo,
Mukiza, nshenjagura; Men' ibinangiwe! Unyemeze yuk' unesheje : Unyimemo,
